name: Donkey Kong
description: Donkey Kong is an arcade game featuring a single-screen platforming challenge. The player controls a character, often referred to as Jumpman or Mario, who must navigate a construction site-themed level to rescue a damsel in distress, Pauline, from the clutches of Donkey Kong, a large ape. Donkey Kong sits at the top of the level, throwing barrels and other obstacles down towards the player. The level consists of multiple platforms connected by ladders. The player must climb ladders and jump over obstacles to reach the top platform and ultimately, Pauline. The barrels roll or bounce down the platforms, posing a direct threat. Jumpman can jump over barrels and other projectiles. The level also contains fireballs that move around the platforms randomly, also posing a threat to Jumpman. Jumpman can obtain a hammer which provides temporary invincibility, allowing him to destroy barrels and fireballs by touching them. After a certain number of levels have been cleared, the game increases in difficulty with faster enemies, and different barrel patterns. The game ends when Jumpman loses all of his lives.
